summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BrainBattle quiz application. Backend APIs 93.3% successful, frontend UI/UX fully functional, end-to-end game creation and joining flows working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 400 when attempting to start game with less than 2 players
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - not a bug, proper validation

integration_issues.issue: Clipboard API requires user gesture/secure context
integration_issues.impact: Browser security limitation, not application bug

passed_tests: Game management APIs (create, join, team selection) (100% success)
Game action APIs (pause/resume, answer submission) (100% success)
Homepage loads with correct BRAINBATTLE logo and design
Create game tab with all required fields (topic, difficulty, mode, questions)
Join game tab with PIN and player name inputs
Dark brutalist design theme with correct colors
Syne and Space Mono fonts implementation
End-to-end game creation flow with AI question generation
Team selection (КОМАНДА А / КОМАНДА Б) buttons
Game PIN sharing and joining via PIN code
